# Abderrahim GHAZALI

> Software engineer with 11+ years of experience. Specializes in AI agent development, RAG pipelines, n8n workflow automation, and enterprise Drupal architecture. Open to consulting and contract work.

## Pages

- [Home](https://abderrahimghazali.github.io/): Overview of expertise and contact
- [About](https://abderrahimghazali.github.io/about): Background, technical depth, and approach

## Expertise

- AI & Automation: autonomous agents, RAG pipelines, semantic search, LangChain, n8n
- Drupal: custom module development, migrations, high-traffic platforms (500K+ monthly users)
- Full-Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, Symfony, Laravel
- DevOps: Docker, CI/CD, cloud deployment
